# bitsPerBlock

**Instance Property**

Number of bits per pixel. If [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/blockSize] is greater than (1, 1) then this represents bits per block.

## Declaration

```swift
var bitsPerBlock: Int
```
title: bitsPerBlock
